summary: Venlafaxine has been consistently linked through multiple studies showing that abrupt cessation leads to significant adverse effects such as increased anxiety and sleep disturbances due primarily because it affects both norepinephrine and serotonin pathways making gradual tapering essential before complete discontinue under medical supervision if necessary based off current best
